summary: A moderately paced food-forward itinerary through Tokyo, mixing high-end dining with iconic markets.

stops.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
stops.reason: Essential for a food-focused traveler, best visited mid-morning.

stops.name: Sukiyabashi Jiro
stops.reason: Fits your luxury budget and interest in exceptional dining.

stops.name: Omoide Yokocho
stops.reason: Contrasts fine dining with an authentic, lively food alley.

stops.name: Ginza
stops.reason: Upscale shopping and dining district matching your budget tier.
